item.title: Hexia is back!!!
item.description: I’m finally settled back in at home yippee! TLDR I moved home to save for a house and spend some time with family (I typically live down south in the UK, but moved back up north). Anyway here is Hexia! I wanted to have the art be veryy good so after scrapping a lot of drawings, this one came out great and I’m really happy! Extra nudie versions on my patreon! https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella www.patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: You Maniacs! You Blew It Up! Ah, Damn You! God Damn You All to Hell!
item.description: They broke the broke the New York Times Pitchbot! This is so egregiously horrible that it has exceeded the Pitchbot's ability to parody the "Gray lady." It is a complete mind f%$# that a person who has dedicated many minutes every day to satirizing self described, "All the news that's fit to print," has found that the actual behavior of a NY Times reporter beyond parody.
item.dc:creator: msaroff4

item.title: The guy who started a site to creep on women is lonely?
item.description: Unscheduled Edit: Hey Mark, you still sure about our AI best friends? Look what I found on the internet today: https://www.forbes.com/sites/emilybaker-white/2025/05/12/these-ai-tutors-for-kids-gave-fentanyl-recipes-and-dangerous-diet-advice/ Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes, my dudes! To clarify my original post, I am not a fan of AI, I make plenty of rant-y posts about AI fuckery. I’m hating on Zuck because he deserves it. He was a piece of shit in college who started Facebook to rank the hotness or the dating probability of women (I forget exact details, doesn’t matter it’s all gross) and he has made zero improvements to his character in almost 2 decades. I’ll listen to Zuck if he is announcing the shut down of Facebook or, his plans to return to his home planet now that his mission to fuck up Earth is nearly complete. Original post below: Source/ https://bsky.app/profile/nerdjpg.com/post/3loyukzzmbk2x Friends tend to share common values. You don’t have any values, you sold out friends and coworkers on your way to the top, you are exactly where you belong. Note: I’m not hating on AI in this post, this a Zuck hate focused post. He is stupid and so are his ideas.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Remember folks, Betterhelp is NOT your friend! So don't give them money FOR ANY REASON WHATSOEVER.
item.description:
Credits: Ryan Kelly Comedy (Youth Pastor Ryan on YouTube) This dude is funny, he makes videos about the history of a bunch of companies/organizations (e.g. Ben & Jerry, Nestlè, Boeing and so on).
The same dude, this is his follow-up video.
Cat tax. I found this small kitty a while ago when I was strolling in a city near mine. This kitty was behind a closed gate, so I don't think it was a stray.

item.title: What Happened Today #102
item.description: $148 million for dinner with Trump. That's what 220 anonymous crypto buyers finally paid today while white South Africans got refugee status and millions fleeing actual genocide remain blocked. America is dying off and being auctioned to the highest bidder. The price of admission is cruelty: 9,000 Afghans face deportation to Taliban rule, EPA scientists scramble for their jobs, and air traffic controllers break under failing systems. When access is for sale and suffering is policy, we can't afford to look away. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Links! 1. https://go.govbrief.today/south-africans-arrive 2. https://go.govbrief.today/illinois-autism-data 3. https://go.govbrief.today/gop-school-vouchers 4. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-denies-bias 5. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-tells-scientists-reapply 6. https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-tps-afghanistan 7. https://go.govbrief.today/judges-allows-irs-dhs 8. https://go.govbrief.today/eeoc-ortiz-termination 9. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-crypto-dinner-promotion 10. https://go.govbrief.today/musk-boring-railroad 11. https://go.govbrief.today/wire-services-airforceone 12. https://go.govbrief.today/newark-ground-delay 13. https://go.govbrief.today/episcopal-church-leaves-resettlement
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: Fulustreka

item.title: Day # whatever of me trying to change people’s minds about spiders
item.description: Happy Tuesday, Imgur! Sorry I was MIA yesterday; food poisoning got me good. Anyways, back to our regularly scheduled programming! . Spiders are similar to cats in that they’re frequently grooming themselves. Jumping spiders are covered in sensitive hairs called “setae” that take in a lot of sensory information. Therefore self-care is essential for Ms Bunnette! Self-care is essential for you, too. Relax your shoulders, unclench your jaw, and drink some water . MV Edit: does anyone have advice for self-publishing physical copies of a children’s book? If so PLEASE dm me! I wrote and illustrated a book about a jumping spider who helps a little girl through chemo. I just need to format and print it. Any help would be amazing!! https://imgur.com/gallery/DSwpaVn
item.dc:creator: stonedlikeicheckedoutmedusa

item.title: I love the flex!
item.description: Vids like this always brings tears to my eyes. When she scores and the camera goes crazy, I felt that way as well! Bless those kids, coaches and the parents who raised them. Kids treating each other just like anyone else, supporting one another, helping one another, good for their mental health and feeling of community!
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice
